product_boundary: Legion Next remains a workflow orchestration tool. Eve is a replaceable runtime driver candidate, not the product boundary.

public_contracts.eve_surface: agent directory with agent.ts, instructions, tools, skills, subagents, channels, schedules

public_contracts.legion_need: durable execution and resumable workflow runs
public_contracts.eve_surface: durable session state, sessionId, continuationToken, reconnectable session stream
public_contracts.phase_0_result: compatible in principle; live crash-resume proof deferred to Phase 5

public_contracts.eve_surface: defineTool, approval predicates, ctx authorization helpers, documented safeguard requirements
public_contracts.phase_0_result: compatible with Legion policy enforcement outside model prose
compatible in principle; secret canary and filesystem/network denial tests deferred to Phase 5
